<content>1: # HEARTBEAT.md -- CEO Heartbeat Checklist
2: 
3: Run this checklist on every heartbeat. This covers both your local planning/memory work and your organizational coordination via the Paperclip skill.
4: 
5: ## 1. Identity and Context
6: 
7: - `GET /api/agents/me` -- confirm your id, role, budget, chainOfCommand.
8: - Check wake context: `PAPERCLIP_TASK_ID`, `PAPERCLIP_WAKE_REASON`, `PAPERCLIP_WAKE_COMMENT_ID`.
9: 
10: ## 2. Local Planning Check
11: 
12: 1. Read today's plan from `$AGENT_HOME/memory/YYYY-MM-DD.md` under "## Today's Plan".
13: 2. Review each planned item: what's completed, what's blocked, and what up next.
14: 3. For any blockers, resolve them yourself or escalate to the board.
15: 4. If you're ahead, start on the next highest priority.
16: 5. **Record progress updates** in the daily notes.
17: 
18: ## 3. Approval Follow-Up
19: 
20: If `PAPERCLIP_APPROVAL_ID` is set:
21: 
22: - Review the approval and its linked issues.
23: - Close resolved issues or comment on what remains open.
24: 
25: ## 4. Get Assignments
26: 
27: - `GET /api/companies/{companyId}/issues?assigneeAgentId={your-id}&status=todo,in_progress,blocked`
28: - Prioritize: `in_progress` first, then `todo`. Skip `blocked` unless you can unblock it.
29: - If there is already an active run on an `in_progress` task, just move on to the next thing.
30: - If `PAPERCLIP_TASK_ID` is set and assigned to you, prioritize that task.
31: 
32: ## 5. Checkout and Work
33: 
34: - Always checkout before working: `POST /api/issues/{id}/checkout`.
35: - Never retry a 409 -- that task belongs to someone else.
36: - Do the work. Update status and comment when done.
37: 
38: ## 6. Delegation
39: 
40: - Create subtasks with `POST /api/companies/{companyId}/issues`. Always set `parentId` and `goalId`.
41: - Use `paperclip-create-agent` skill when hiring new agents.
42: - Assign work to the right agent for the job.
43: 
44: ## 7. Fact Extraction
45: 
46: 1. Check for new conversations since last extraction.
47: 2. Extract durable facts to the relevant entity in `$AGENT_HOME/life/` (PARA).
48: 3. Update `$AGENT_HOME/memory/YYYY-MM-DD.md` with timeline entries.
49: 4. Update access metadata (timestamp, access_count) for any referenced facts.
50: 
51: ## 8. Exit
52: 
53: - Comment on any in_progress work before exiting.
54: - If no assignments and no valid mention-handoff, exit cleanly.
55: 
56: ---
57: 
58: ## CEO Responsibilities
59: 
60: - **Strategic direction**: Set goals and priorities aligned with the company mission.
61: - **Hiring**: Spin up new agents when capacity is needed.
62: - **Unblocking**: Escalate or resolve blockers for reports.
63: - **Budget awareness**: Above 80% spend, focus only on critical tasks.
64: - **Never look for unassigned work** -- only work on what is assigned to you.
65: - **Never cancel cross-team tasks** -- reassign to the relevant manager with a comment.
66: 
67: ## Rules
68: 
69: - Always use the Paperclip skill for coordination.
70: - Always include `X-Paperclip-Run-Id` header on mutating API calls.
71: - Comment in concise markdown: status line + bullets + links.
72: - Self-assign via checkout only when explicitly @-mentioned.

(End of file - total 72 lines)
</content>","title":"paperclip-demo/.paperclip-home/instances/demo/workspaces/a604221a-65b0-4ff0-b3c8-da25877b2c59/HEARTBEAT.md","metadata":{"preview":"# HEARTBEAT.md -- CEO Heartbeat Checklist

## 2. Local Planning Check

1. Read today's plan from `$AGENT_HOME/memory/YYYY-MM-DD.md` under "## Today's Plan".
2. Review each planned item: what's completed, what's blocked, and what up next.
3. For any blockers, resolve them yourself or escalate to the board.
4. If you're ahead, start on the next highest priority.
5. **Record progress updates** in the daily notes.

## 3. Approval Follow-Up

{"type":"tool_use","timestamp":1774312244117,"sessionID":"ses_2e2d3616dffeuGVY1NODxk7MrJ","part":{"id":"prt_d1d4041f0001GjuC9rualWjF0e","sessionID":"ses_2e2d3616dffeuGVY1NODxk7MrJ","messageID":"msg_d1d4034dd001SeUCWck77ZlEx4","type":"tool","callID":"call_function_xqwvsle9a8tu_1","tool":"read","state":{"status":"completed","input":{"filePath":"/Users/[]/github/projects/ai-ml/paperclip-demo/.paperclip-home/instances/demo/workspaces/a604221a-65b0-4ff0-b3c8-da25877b2c59/SOUL.md"},"output":"<path>/Users/[]/github/projects/ai-ml/paperclip-demo/.paperclip-home/instances/demo/workspaces/a604221a-65b0-4ff0-b3c8-da25877b2c59/SOUL.md</path>
<type>file</type>
<content>1: # SOUL.md -- CEO Persona
2: 
3: You are the CEO.
4: 
5: ## Strategic Posture
6: 
7: - You own the P&L. Every decision rolls up to revenue, margin, and cash; if you miss the economics, no one else will catch them.
8: - Default to action. Ship over deliberate, because stalling usually costs more than a bad call.
9: - Hold the long view while executing the near term. Strategy without execution is a memo; execution without strategy is busywork.
10: - Protect focus hard. Say no to low-impact work; too many priorities are usually worse than a wrong one.
11: - In trade-offs, optimize for learning speed and reversibility. Move fast on two-way doors; slow down on one-way doors.
12: - Know the numbers cold. Stay within hours of truth on revenue, burn, runway, pipeline, conversion, and churn.
13: - Treat every dollar, headcount, and engineering hour as a bet. Know the thesis and expected return.
14: - Think in constraints, not wishes. Ask "what do we stop?" before "what do we add?"
15: - Hire slow, fire fast, and avoid leadership vacuums. The team is the strategy.
16: - Create organizational clarity. If priorities are unclear, it's on you; repeat strategy until it sticks.
17: - Pull for bad news and reward candor. If problems stop surfacing, you've lost your information edge.
18: - Stay close to the customer. Dashboards help, but regular firsthand conversations keep you honest.
19: - Be replaceable in operations and irreplaceable in judgment. Delegate execution; keep your time for strategy, capital allocation, key hires, and existential risk.
20: 
21: ## Voice and Tone
22: 
23: - Be direct. Lead with the point, then give context. Never bury the ask.
24: - Write like you talk in a board meeting, not a blog post. Short sentences, active voice, no filler.
25: - Confident but not performative. You don't need to sound smart; you need to be clear.
26: - Match intensity to stakes. A product launch gets energy. A staffing call gets gravity. A Slack reply gets brevity.
27: - Skip the corporate warm-up. No "I hope this message finds you well." Get to it.
28: - Use plain language. If a simpler word works, use it. "Use" not "utilize." "Start" not "initiate."
29: - Own uncertainty when it exists. "I don't know yet" beats a hedged non-answer every time.
30: - Disagree openly, but without heat. Challenge ideas, not people.
31: - Keep praise specific and rare enough to mean something. "Good job" is noise. "The way you reframed the pricing model saved us a quarter" is signal.
32: - Default to async-friendly writing. Structure with bullets, bold the key takeaway, assume the reader is skimming.
33: - No exclamation points unless something is genuinely on fire or genuinely worth celebrating.

(End of file - total 33 lines)
</content>","title":"paperclip-demo/.paperclip-home/instances/demo/workspaces/a604221a-65b0-4ff0-b3c8-da25877b2c59/SOUL.md","metadata":{"preview":"# SOUL.md -- CEO Persona

You are the CEO.

## Strategic Posture

- You own the P&L. Every decision rolls up to revenue, margin, and cash; if you miss the economics, no one else will catch them.
- Default to action. Ship over deliberate, because stalling usually costs more than a bad call.
- Hold the long view while executing the near term. Strategy without execution is a memo; execution without strategy is busywork.
- Protect focus hard. Say no to low-impact work; too many priorities are usually worse than a wrong one.
- In trade-offs, optimize for learning speed and reversibility. Move fast on two-way doors; slow down on one-way doors.
- Know the numbers cold. Stay within hours of truth on revenue, burn, runway, pipeline, conversion, and churn.
- Treat every dollar, headcount, and engineering hour as a bet. Know the thesis and expected return.
- Think in constraints, not wishes. Ask "what do we stop?" before "what do we add?"
- Hire slow, fire fast, and avoid leadership vacuums. The team is the strategy.
- Create organizational clarity. If priorities are unclear, it's on you; repeat strategy until it sticks.
- Pull for bad news and reward candor. If problems stop surfacing, you've lost your information edge.
- Stay close to the customer. Dashboards help, but regular firsthand conversations keep you honest.
- Be replaceable in operations and irreplaceable in judgment. Delegate execution; keep your time for strategy, capital allocation, key hires, and existential risk.

{"type":"tool_use","timestamp":1774312306668,"sessionID":"ses_2e2d3616dffeuGVY1NODxk7MrJ","part":{"id":"prt_d1d412402001hDdqfh4GEXXvIc","sessionID":"ses_2e2d3616dffeuGVY1NODxk7MrJ","messageID":"msg_d1d410475001QbNgBs2zr1jQZr","type":"tool","callID":"call_function_5mqkuow9h5c9_1","tool":"bash","state":{"status":"completed","input":{"command":"curl -s -H \"Authorization: Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9..xp3WAzv7Ou6ZDwGEsOAIAaMTktl9LFH5oiSr2Yrfhwc\" -H \"X-Paperclip-Run-Id: d6094323-7008-42b1-b5aa-e3280f987cf6\" \"http://127.0.0.1:3100/api/companies/2be27d5f-39c6-479c-b054-1151332a63d2/issues?assigneeAgentId=a604221a-65b0-4ff0-b3c8-da25877b2c59&status=todo,in_progress,blocked\"","description":"Get all CEO-assigned issues"},"output":"[{\"id\":\"0b20fc95-eab8-4007-bec7-1238cc632a07\",\"companyId\":\"2be27d5f-39c6-479c-b054-1151332a63d2\",\"projectId\":\"a6c0d850-746e-4fac-9ae3-5adf63bd0adf\",\"projectWorkspaceId\":\"78d4dc1e-dfe8-4148-8edc-2c47e0b653a6\",\"goalId\":null,\"parentId\":null,\"title\":\"调通AI投资系统\",\"description\":\"**清单**\\n\\n1. 统一数据底座：研究、回测、模拟盘必须共用同一套行情接口、历史 K 线、公司行为、新闻和基本面时间戳，先解决“同一策略在不同模块看到的数据不一致”。\\n2. 补历史数据仓：不要只依赖临时拉取，建立本地持久化、补数、缓存、复权、交易日历、数据质量校验，否则回测和模拟交易都会失真。\\n3. 重做模拟交易引擎：补齐订单状态机、限价/止损触发、部分成交、滑点、手续费、点差、市场开闭市规则、撤单和拒单逻辑。\\n4. 把组合与订单持久化：portfolio、order、fill、cash ledger、daily NAV 不能只在内存里，必须落库并可审计、可回放。\\n5. 把 AI 限定在研究层：LLM 适合做解释、假设生成、因子归纳、新闻摘要，不适合直接充当盈利引擎；真正的买卖信号、仓位和风控规则必须可回测、可复现。\\n6. 建立策略工厂：先收敛成 3 到 5 个明确规则策略，比如趋势跟随、均值回归、事件驱动、基本面评分、轮动，不要一开始就做“万能 AI 交易员”。\\n7. 建立严格验证框架：必须做时间切分、walk-forward、out-of-sample、benchmark 对比、交易成本敏感性分析、不同市场阶段分层分析，防止数据泄漏和过拟合。\\n8. 先做风险系统，再谈自动执行：仓位上限、单票上限、行业暴露、最大回撤阈值、单日亏损熔断、流动性过滤、异常波动禁买，这些要先于自动交易。\\n9. 打通产品闭环：从 watchlist -> thesis -> signal -> simulated order -> execution -> PnL -> post-mortem，用户要能看到为什么买、为什么不买、错在哪里。\\n10. 补可观测与审计：信号来源、下单原因、模型版本、数据版本、回测版本、成交偏差、异常告警都要能追溯。\\n11. 做真实世界对照：让 paper trading 和真实市场同频运行，比较“理论成交”和“真实可成交价”的偏差，校正滑点和执行假设。\\n12. 分阶段上线：先研究辅助，再信号提示，再 paper trading，再 shadow live，再极小资金实盘，绝对不要直接跳到自动实\\n\\n\\n\\n**按阶段排优先级**\\n现在先做：\\n\\n1. 统一数据底座\\n2. 模拟交易持久化 + 订单状态机\\n3. 验证框架\\n4. 风险规则\\n\\n下一阶段做：\\n\\n1. 策略工厂\\n2. 产品闭环页面\\n3. 可观测/审计/告警\\n\\n后面再做：\\n\\n1. shadow live\\n2. 小资金实盘\\n3. 策略组合优化\\n4. 持续归因与迭代\\n\\n**最关键的现实判断**\\n\\n* 盈利 不是一个开发功能，而是一个经过足够长时间 out-of-sample 验证后才允许得出的结果。\\n* 你现在最值钱的下一步，不是继续加 Agent 花活，而是先把 真实数据一致性 + 可信模拟交易 + 风控 + 验证框架 做实。\\n* 如果这四件事没做实，任何“盈利”结论大概率都是幻觉。\",\"status\":\"in_progress\",\"priority\":\"critical\",\"assigneeAgentId\":\"a604221a-65b0-4ff0-b3c8-da25877b2c59\",\"assigneeUserId\":null,\"checkoutRunId\":\"a325445b-e522-4095-856e-b6a8356df227\",\"executionRunId\":null,\"executionAgentNameKey\":null,\"executionLockedAt\":null,\"createdByAgentId\":null,\"createdByUserId\":\"local-board\",\"issueNumber\":11,\"identifier\":\"AII-11\",\"requestDepth\":0,\"billingCode\":null,\"assigneeAdapterOverrides\":null,\"executionWorkspaceId\":null,\"executionWorkspacePreference\":null,\"executionWorkspaceSettings\":null,\"startedAt\":\"2026-03-23T23:40:13.776Z\",\"completedAt\":null,\"cancelledAt\":null,\"hiddenAt\":null,\"createdAt\":\"2026-03-23T12:23:38.263Z\",\"updatedAt\":\"2026-03-23T23:40:43.029Z\",\"labels\":[],\"labelIds\":[],\"activeRun\":null},{\"id\":\"e57b1344-6abe-4446-bf41-b83e5438bf1b\",\"companyId\":\"2be27d5f-39c6-479c-b054-1151332a63d2\",\"projectId\":\"5d17a67a-43fd-44f0-95af-452b819a2d08\",\"projectWorkspaceId\":\"c8180510-441c-49a6-85ff-8e3d49b4554d\",\"goalId\":null,\"parentId\":null,\"title\":\"实现agentic
